an5.43:1.1: Then Anāthapiṇḍika the householder went to the Blessed One and, on arrival, having bowed down to him, sat to one side. As he was sitting there the Blessed One said to him:
an5.43:2.1: “These five things, householder, are welcome, agreeable, pleasant, & hard to obtain in the world.
an5.43:2.3: “Long life is welcome, agreeable, pleasant, & hard to obtain in the world.
an5.43:2.4: “Beauty is welcome, agreeable, pleasant, & hard to obtain in the world.
an5.43:2.5: “Happiness is welcome, agreeable, pleasant, & hard to obtain in the world.
an5.43:2.6: “Status is welcome, agreeable, pleasant, & hard to obtain in the world.
an5.43:2.7: “Rebirth in heaven is welcome, agreeable, pleasant, & hard to obtain in the world.
an5.43:3.1: “Now, I tell you, these five things are not to be obtained by reason of prayers or wishes.
an5.43:3.2: If they were to be obtained by reason of prayers or wishes, who here would lack them?
an5.43:4.1: It’s not fitting for the disciple of the noble ones who desires long life to pray for it or to delight in doing so.
an5.43:4.2: Instead, the disciple of the noble ones who desires long life should follow the path of practice leading to long life.
an5.43:4.3: In so doing, he will attain long life,
an5.43:5.1: “It’s not fitting for the disciple of the noble ones who desires beauty to pray for it or to delight in doing so.
an5.43:5.2: Instead, the disciple of the noble ones who desires beauty should follow the path of practice leading to beauty.
an5.43:5.3: In so doing, he will attain beauty,
an5.43:6.1: “It’s not fitting for the disciple of the noble ones who desires happiness to pray for it or to delight in doing so.
an5.43:6.2: Instead, the disciple of the noble ones who desires happiness should follow the path of practice leading to happiness.
an5.43:6.3: In so doing, he will attain happiness,
an5.43:7.1: “It’s not fitting for the disciple of the noble ones who desires status to pray for it or to delight in doing so.
an5.43:7.2: Instead, the disciple of the noble ones who desires status should follow the path of practice leading to status.
an5.43:7.3: In so doing, he will attain status,
an5.43:8.1: “It’s not fitting for the disciple of the noble ones who desires rebirth in heaven to pray for it or to delight in doing so.
an5.43:8.2: Instead, the disciple of the noble ones who desires rebirth in heaven should follow the path of practice leading to rebirth in heaven.
an5.43:8.4: he will attain rebirth in heaven.”
an5.43:10.2: the wise praise heedfulness in making merit.
an5.43:11.3: By breaking through to his welfare
